item.title: Messaging channel connection
item.intent: clawhq connect must configure and verify a messaging channel so the user can talk to their agent. Without this, the agent exists but is unreachable.
item.description: HIGH VALUE: The last step before the user has a working agent. Without messaging channel, the agent exists but the user can't talk to it. SEQUENCING: Must run after CQ-002 (gateway client — health ping requires WebSocket RPC) and CQ-004 (agent must be deployed before channel can be connected). Acceptance: 'clawhq connect' guides Telegram/WhatsApp bot token setup + verifies with live health ping via Gateway WebSocket; user receives a test message from their new agent.
steps: Implement 'clawhq connect' guided setup for Telegram bot token
Verify connection with live health ping via Gateway WebSocket
Send test message to confirm agent is reachable
acceptanceCriteria: 'clawhq connect' guides Telegram/WhatsApp bot token setup
Health ping verifies connection via Gateway WebSocket
User receives a test message from their agent on completion
